sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64756" key="makw/n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μᾰκών</orth>, <sense id="n64756.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">μηκάομαι</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μάκων</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾱ]</pron>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μᾱκώνειον</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μᾱκωνίς</orth>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">μηκ</itype>-.</sense> </entryFree>
